description: Missing test coverage for GetDisplayName with invalid SkillLevel values (e.g., (SkillLevel)0, (SkillLevel)99). The dictionary lookup will throw KeyNotFoundException for any value outside 1-20, but no test verifies this edge case behavior.
suggestedFix: Add a test like GetDisplayName_InvalidSkillLevel_ThrowsKeyNotFoundException that verifies calling GetDisplayName with an out-of-range SkillLevel throws the expected exception. Alternatively, add a guard clause to GetDisplayName and test for it.

description: Test name has a typo: GetDisplayName_MidpointLevel_ReturnsMediacore should be GetDisplayName_MidpointLevel_ReturnsMediocre. 'Mediacore' is misspelled.
suggestedFix: Rename the test method to fix the typo.

description: Test name GetDisplayName_Progression_IsMonotonic is misleading. The Hattrick skill scale is NOT monotonically increasing in perceived quality. The test actually verifies exact display name values, not monotonicity.
suggestedFix: Rename to GetDisplayName_AllLevels_MatchExpectedProgression to accurately describe the assertion.

description: Test GetDisplayName_LowerLevels_SuggestWeakness uses vague assertions (checking that level 1 contains 'non' and level 3 does not contain 'excellent'). Duplicates coverage already provided by the full progression test at line 228.
suggestedFix: Remove this test since the full progression test already verifies exact display names for all 20 levels.

description: Test GetDisplayName_UpperLevels_SuggestExcellence uses vague assertions. Duplicated by the full progression test at line 228.
Test naming convention violation: All_Enums_Can_Be_Converted_To_String_And_Back uses underscores within word boundaries instead of PascalCase segments per MethodName_Scenario_ExpectedResult.
Test naming convention violation: Specialty_And_PlayerPersonality_CanBeUsedTogether uses underscores within word boundaries.
Test naming convention violation: Formation_And_Tactic_AndTeamAttitude_CanCoexist has inconsistent underscore usage.
Excessive test duplication: 12 individual HasXMember tests are entirely redundant with the AllMembersAreExpected tests which already verify member existence, names, and count.
suggestedFix: Remove individual HasXMember tests; keep AllMembersAreExpected and value/integration tests.

description: Excessive test duplication: 20 individual member existence tests are redundant with AllMembersAreExpected tests for Formation, Tactic, and TeamAttitude.
Excessive test duplication: Individual HasXMember tests for SkillType and SkillLevel spot-checks are redundant with their comprehensive counterparts.
Excessive test duplication: Individual member existence tests and AllMembers_CanBeEnumerated tests for Specialty, PlayerPersonality, and CoachType duplicate coverage from MembersHaveCorrectNames.
suggestedFix: Remove individual HasXMember and CanBeEnumerated tests.
